queries.original_sql_xml:
<select id="selectUserById" parameterType="int" resultType="UserVO">
    SELECT USER_ID,
           USER_NAME,
           NVL(EMAIL, 'N/A') AS EMAIL,
           SYSDATE AS QUERY_DATE
    FROM TB_USER
    WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
</select>

<insert id="insertUser" parameterType="UserVO">
    INSERT INTO TB_USER (
        USER_ID, USER_NAME, EMAIL, REG_DATE
    ) VALUES (
        USER_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
        #{userName},
        #{email},
        SYSDATE
    )
</insert>

<update id="updateUserName" parameterType="map">
    UPDATE TB_USER
    SET USER_NAME = #{userName},
        MOD_DATE = SYSDATE
    WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
</update>

<select id="selectCount" resultType="int">
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER
    WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
</select>
